title: Finance Tracker
description: Full-stack personal finance web app focused on clarity, control, and consistency. Helps users manage accounts, track spending, monitor budgets, and stay ahead of recurring bills with a clean, fast, mobile-friendly experience.
highlights: Unified dashboard for net worth, cash flow, budgets, and bills
Redis caching layer for performance optimization
Google OAuth + backend auth controls with secure session management
Automated scheduler for reminders and budget alerts via node-cron
Engineering blog and direct feedback pipeline built into the product

title: Distributed File System
description: A distributed file storage system designed for efficient and reliable file storage and retrieval across multiple storage servers. Supports concurrent uploads/downloads with high availability and fuzzy search capabilities.
highlights: Concurrent uploads and downloads across multiple storage servers
Fuzzy search system for finding files with partial/approximate queries
Load balancer distributing data chunks for rapid access and high availability
Server health monitoring with cron jobs and automatic data redistribution
Personalized user dashboard with dynamic system status

title: Crave Express - Food Delivery
description: A MERN stack food delivery web platform offering takeout service that connects consumers with local restaurants, providing a convenient way to order food with payment integration.
highlights: Full-stack MERN application with restaurant listing and ordering
Payment integration for seamless checkout experience
Real-time order tracking and status updates
Responsive UI connecting consumers with local restaurants
